utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, the top-level keys are: selected_property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Count of items appearing: 6/6, but we must verify they are fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details. 1) property: The required key is 'property: selected property with details and price'. The solution uses 'selected_property' instead of 'property', but it includes details (name, location, size, bedrooms, price). Since the format asked specifically for the key 'property', this is not strictly matching the required item name, so it is not fully specified according to the format. 2) financing: Present with options and some terms (LTV for two, arrangement fees). The format asks 'financing: financing solution with terms'—this is present and includes terms, so covered. 3) legal_services: Present with costs for basic and premium; covered. 4) moving_services: Present with arrangements and costs; covered. 5) setup_services: Present with utility and setup services; covered. 6) total_budget: Present with a breakdown including property price, financing fees, legal estimate, survey estimate, moving, utilities; covered. Therefore, only the 'property' item fails due to incorrect key name not matching the required format item. The other five are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects the purchase property 'Historic Townhouse' and lists financing options: Traditional Mortgage, First-Time Buyer Scheme (matches 'First-Time Buyer'), International Buyer Support (matches 'International Buyer'), and Cash Purchase Option (matches 'Cash Purchase'). It also lists legal services Basic and Premium packages (map to Basic Legal Package and Premium Legal Package), moving services Self-Move and Standard Moving, setup services Basic Utilities Package and Premium Utilities Package (map to Basic Utilities and Premium Utilities), and survey estimates Basic Survey and Full Structural Survey. I matched each referenced item to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth ratings and extracted the corresponding numeric ratings.
